You deserve choices. Whether you’re looking for a place to rest and recharge or somewhere to catch up on work, enjoy our growing network of airport lounges across 140 countries and counting
The American Express Global Lounge Collection include access to best-in-class airport lounges like The Centurion Lounge, Delta Lounge and Priority pass lounges.
GET EXCLUSIVE STAY BENEFITS UP TO INR 44,300. 3

The Hotel Collection offers you a world of luxurious comfort, which includes a US$100 experience credit and a room upgrade

Eligibility
To save time before you apply for your Card, it’s best to make sure you can say yes to the following:
I am over 18 years of age
If self-employed: My company has been trading for more than 12 months.
I have a good credit history and no payment defaults
I have current residential address in India
I have an Indian or multinational bank’s savings or current account in India
I am Employed and have a Personal Annual Income of INR 25 lakhs and above or Self Employed with a Personal Annual Income of INR 15 lakhs and above.
I/We confirm that I / supplementary card applicant/s is a Resident Indian as defined under the Income Tax Act of India and hereby declare that I/We will notify American Express Banking Corp. if there is a change in the residential status
I understand American Express Cards are currently issued to residents of Delhi/NCR, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Pune, Hyderabad, Jaipur, Kolkata, Indore, Coimbatore, Chandigarh/Tricity, Ahmedabad, Surat, Vadodra, Bhopal, Bhubaneshwar, Ernakulam, Vijaywada, Lucknow, Ludhiana, Nagpur, Nasik, Trivandrum , Mysuru , Cuttack & Vizag  subject to conditions

For example, for a spend of Rs. 50 on an eligible merchant the Cardmember will get 10 Membership Rewards ® points (if merchant is under 10X category) and 5 Membership Rewards ® points (if merchant is under 5X category). Card Type
Credit Card
Annual fee
First year fee: Rs. 5,000 plus applicable taxes.
Second year onwards: Rs. 5,000 plus applicable taxes.
Reward Earn Rate
Earn 1 Membership Rewards® Point for every 2 Rs. 50 spent except for spend on Fuel, Insurance, Utilities, Cash Transactions and EMI conversion at Point of Sale 2 .
Key Benefits
TRAVEL VOUCHERS
Spend 9 Rs 1.9 lakhs in a Cardmembership year 5 and get 7,500 Membership Rewards ® points that can be redeemed on Platinum Travel Collection .
ADDITIONAL TRAVEL VOUCHERS
Spend 9 Rs 4 lakhs in a Cardmembership year 5 and get 10,000 Membership Rewards ® points that can be redeemed on Platinum Travel Collection .
Spend 9 Rs 7 lakhs in a Cardmembership year 5 and get additional 22,500 Membership Rewards ® points that can be redeemed on Platinum Travel Collection .
AIRPORT LOUNGES
Enjoy 8 complimentary visits per year (limited to two complimentary visit per quarter) to airport lounges across India.
TAJ EXPERIENCES E-GIFT CARD
Additionally, Get a Taj Experiences E-Gift Card worth Rs. 10,000 from the Taj, SeleQtions and Vivanta Hotels 3 on spending Rs 7 lakhs.
Rewards Programme
American Express Platinum Travel Credit Card rewards you in the following ways:
Earn 1 Membership Rewards Point for every 2 Rs. 50 spent except for spend on Fuel, Insurance, Utilities, Cash Transactions and EMI conversion at Point of Sale 2 .
You earn Milestone Bonus Membership Rewards Points on the following three Milestones as defined below:
Spending 9 Rs. 15,000 within 90 days of Cardmembership entitles you to a Welcome Gift 1 of 10,000 * Membership Reward ® points
Reaching spend 9 threshold of Rs. 1.9 Lakhs every membership year 5 and get 7,500 * bonus Membership Rewards ® points that can be redeemed on Platinum Travel Collection .
Reaching spend 9 threshold of Rs. 4 Lakhs every membership year 5 and get 10,000 * bonus Membership Rewards ® points that can be redeemed on Platinum Travel Collection .
Reaching spend 9 threshold of Rs. 7 Lakhs every membership year 5 and get additional 22,500 * bonus Membership Rewards ® points that can be redeemed on Platinum Travel Collection and a Taj Stay voucher 3 worth Rs. 10,000 from Taj, SeleQtions and Vivanta Hotels.
That's not all. You can continue to earn Membership Reward points on all your spending 2 with the American Express ® Platinum Travel Credit Card.
Beginning 3 May, 2022, the Membership Rewards Points that have been accrued onto your American Express Platinum Travel Credit Card will no longer expire till the card is active and in good standing . In the event of Card cancellation, initiated by either the Cardmember or American Express, the Membership Rewards Points will get forfeited within 30 days of the cancellation.
Offers and Privileges
Enjoy complimentary membership 4 to Priority Pass, with the US$99 annual membership fee waived off exclusively for you.
Fuel Convenience Fee Waiver at HPCL
Enjoy exciting discounts of up to 20% every time you dine at select restaurants. Click here to know more
Split the payment and not the joy. Use your American Express Credit Card for your next big purchase & pay in easy EMI.
Benefits from Platinum
Enjoy a host of privileges and services that come with your American Express Card.
Zero Lost Card Liability
Platinum Services
Contactless Payment
Eligibility
To save time before you apply for your Card, it’s best to make sure you can say yes to the following:
I am over 18 years of age
I have an Indian or multinational bank’s savings or current account in India
I have a good credit history and no payment defaults
I have a personal annual income of Rs. 6 Lacs or above (for both Salaried, Self Employed)
I have a permanent residential address in India
If self-employed: My company has been trading for more than 12 months.
I understand American Express Cards are currently issued to residents of Delhi/NCR, Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, Pune, Hyderabad, Jaipur, Indore, Coimbatore, Chandigarh, Ahmedabad, Surat, Vadodra, Lucknow, Ludhiana, Nagpur, Nasik, Trivandrum and Mysuru subject to condition.
I/We confirm that I / supplementary card applicant/s is a Resident Indian as defined under the Income Tax Act of India and hereby declare that I/We will notify American Express Banking Corp. if there is a change in the residential status.

Footnotes
1. Welcome Gift is available only in the 1 st year on payment of the annual fee and on spending INR 15,000 within 90 days of Cardmembership
2. You will not earn Membership Rewards Points on your American Express Card for all your spending on fuel, insurance and utility (electricity, water and gas bills) payments. Fuel includes petrol, diesel, CNG from Oil Marketing Companies (OMCs). Utility services includes providers of household/domestic electricity, gas and water. These providers can be government departments and agencies including local, state, municipal organizations, public housing societies and apartment associations.

In the event of Card cancellation, initiated by either the Cardmember or American Express, the Membership Rewards Points will get forfeited within 30 days of the cancellation.
Effective March 15, 2020, you will not earn Membership Rewards Points on any EMI option selected from a merchant’s website e.g. online shopping with Amazon or Flipkart etc. and on any EMI option selected at Merchant’s terminal e.g. a Chip and PIN transaction at Croma retail store etc. At the same time, you will continue to earn Membership Rewards Points on all EMI transactions through American Express® SafeKey and on all EMI conversions done post purchase. click here .
3. For Taj Stay voucher Terms & Conditions,  click here .
4. Cardmember/accompanied guest has to pay a usage fee. Usage fee is charged per the prevailing retail rate.

7. To view all offers, click here .
8. 0% Convenience fee on fuel purchase at HPCL for transactions less than Rs. 5,000 and 1% Convenience fee on fuel purchases per transaction is applicable for all transactions of Rs. 5,000 and above.
9. Eligible spends do not include cash advances, express cash transaction, draft made from the account, balance transfer, fees and is net of any returns.

Corporate Card
Greater power, Greater privileges.
Request a callback
(opens new window)
The all-new American Express® Platinum Corporate Card brings you benefits made greater, now with Metal. Elevate your business and experience when you travel for business and earn accelerated reward on every spend you make. Experience the powerful backing of Amex as you step into the world of Platinum.
Featured Benefits
Earn Back From Your Usual Business Spends (Effective April 1, 2024)
See all your small and big business spends add up to gift vouchers.
Get a Gift Voucher worth ₹10,000* on spending ₹30,00,000 in a year on your Platinum Corporate Card. You can choose a gift voucher from any of these brands
Flipkart
MakeMyTrip
Yatra
ITC
To know more, click here
Uncover Exclusive Experiences On Business Stays (Effective April 1, 2024)
Enjoy complimentary * membership to Marriott Bonvoy TM Gold Elite Status which offers you elevated experiences at 30 brands and nearly 8,700 properties globally.
You are directly upgraded to Gold Elite status and the requirement to stay at least 25 nights a year is waived off. You get access to the following benefits and much more
10 points per eligible US dollar spent and a 25% * bonus over base-level members
Late checkout up to 2 pm, subject to availability
Room upgrade when available
A welcome gift of points upon arrival
Explore More Possibilities For Your Business (Effective April 1, 2024)
Unlock MakeMyTrip Vouchers worth ₹ 15,000 * by booking international flights and hotels worth ₹2,00,000 with MMT Biz on a single day.
Platinum Travel: Exceptional privileges with every journey
2X Membership Rewards Points on Air India
Enjoy 2X * rewards when you book directly on Air India website or app with your American Express ® Platinum Corporate Card.
No Promocode | No Enrolment | Unlimited Rewards
To know more, click here .
Validity time period: This is a limited time offer until 31 January 2027.
International Airline Program
Travel aboard some of the world's leading airlines and enjoy special perks.
These offers can be availed by bookings by calling up Platinum Travel Services at 0124-2801092 or 1800-419-1092
To know more, click here .
American Express Global Lounge Collection SM
Unwind before you take off with complimentary access at over 1,400 premium lounges around the world.
Enjoy access to The Centurion ® Lounges* and Escape Lounges – The Centurion ® Studio Partner, Lufthansa lounges, and Delta Sky Club ®
Get a membership to the highest tier of Priority Pass TM (valued at US $429) and access to over 1,200 airport lounges across the globe.
Access the Centurion Lounge at Terminal 1, Indira Gandhi International Delhi Airport along with over 30 domestic airport partner lounges across key cities in India.
To know more, click here.
Privileges at FINE HOTELS AND RESORTS
Enjoy complimentary benefits that offer an average total value of ₹44,300* at over 1,300+ extraordinary properties worldwide at FINE HOTELS + RESORTS.
Please call Platinum Travel Services at 0124-2801092 or 1800-419-1092 for the support
*Please note: Average value based on Fine Hotels & Resorts bookings in 2021 for stays of two nights. Actual value will vary based on property, room rate, upgrade availability, and use of benefits.
Platinum Privileges
Taj Epicure Plus
As a Platinum Cardmember, you get complimentary Epicure Plus membership with effect from 01 November 2023. Under Epicure Plus membership,
Earn 25% discount on Food & Beverage on dine-in & takeaway at participating restaurants across hotels for up to 10 persons
Avail 25% discount on Qmin for food deliveries ordered via Qmin mobile application
Enjoy 20% discount on Spa Treatments at Jiva Spas across participating hotels
Complimentary Birthday Cake for Member’s Birthday month
One-time pool access with set lunch and wine at a special price of INR 3,000 per person for up to 4 guests
Happy Hours at Taj Club Lounge in select Taj hotels can be availed twice in a year
What’s more, get discount vouchers on Best Available Rate for Room/Suite stay at select participating properties that can be availed twice in a year Click here to know more. Membership of the Epicure Plus Plan is available upon enrolment.

Gold Benefits
American Express® Gold Corporate Card equips frequent business travelers with essential tools to manage their travel and entertainment expenses while providing peace of mind with travel protection.
Featured Benefits
Airport Lounge Benefits with Priority Pass TM
Get access to 1,200 airport VIP lounges across the world, regardless of your choice of airline, class of ticket or membership in any airline lounge program. Gold Corporate Card offers:
Lounge access to Gold Cardmembers and for accompanied guests at over 1,200 airport lounges worldwide
Two complimentary lounge visits annually
More than two visits lounge visits for Gold Cardmembers will be charged at the prevailing retail rate
To know more, click here .
American Express Domestic Airport Lounge Program
Enjoy access at discounted rates to over 25 domestic airport lounges across India. You can enjoy this benefit at lounges in Ahmedabad, Delhi, Bengaluru, Mumbai, Chennai, Kolkata, Cochin and Hyderabad.
Earn rewards from everyday business expenses
Membership Rewards ® Program
Enroll
Enroll your Gold Corporate Card into the individual Membership Rewards ® program, subject to your Company’s participation in the program. To enroll, you can simply call up the number on the back of the Card.
Earn
Earn 1 point on every ₹50 spent on all your business expenses except for fuel. Utility, telecommunication, Wholesale Spends and insurance on which you earn 1 point per ₹100 spent (capped to a maximum of 1000 points per month).
With effect from 15th September 2023, you will earn 1 Point for every Rs.100 spent on Wholesale Spends
Redeem
Points can be redeemed for a huge range of rewards – from gift cards, points transfer to Air/Hotel loyalty programs, booking travel with points to statement credit, and more.
Assistance While You Travel
Global Emergency Care Helpline
Sometimes the unexpected happens when you travel. A passport is lost, you come down with a sudden illness, a lawyer is needed. Being a Cardmember can make things easier. Global Assist ® Hotline can help you prepare for your trip with customs information and more.
While you're traveling miles away from home, co-ordination and assistance services such as lost passport replacement assistance, translation services, missing luggage assistance, and emergency legal and medical referrals are just a phone call away. Cardmembers are responsible for the costs charged by third-party service providers.
Award-winning 24-Hour Customer Service
Professional and dedicated customer support is always just a phone call away to assist you with billing enquires, replacement Card requests, or access to a Card benefit or service.
Complimentary Business Travel Insurance
Keep your employees protected when they travel both domestically and internationally with complimentary Personal Accident Cover and Licensed Transport Accident Cover for return trips paid with your Corporate Card. Your Card’s complimentary insurance includes cover up to ₹75,00,000 as well as 24x7 access to the American Express Global Assist ® Hotline for emergencies.
Insurance is provided and underwritten by ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited, and is subject to the Terms and Conditions of cover. Exclusions and limitations apply.
Boost Efficiency and Productivity for Business
Online Program Management through @Work
Keep an eye on who’s spending what and get greater visibility of your payables. American Express @Work is a business-to-business online tool, that gives you a clear picture of all your business expenses charged to the Corporate Card. It enables you to deliver more effective supplier strategies, monitor compliance and streamline processes.
Get reports at your fingertips: The sophisticated reporting capabilities allow you to review and analyse data and spending patterns.
Maximise control: With @Work you enjoy hands-on control over expenses by viewing your Company’s expense trends and setting Cardmember spending limits.
Improve compliance: Since you get a detailed view of business expenses incurred, you can easily spot out-of-policy spending. You can set clear spending mandates for your employees and also monitor compliance with suppliers.
Manage the Corporate Card program with ease: From submitting new Card applications to Card replacement requests and managing Cardmember information, @Work makes your day-to-day activities easier.
Control your Working Capital more effectively
Whether your Card is used to pay for goods and services, make large supplier payments, manage everyday employee expenses, or any combination of the above, each Corporate Card provides instant access to unsecured funds that can help your company keep cash on hand for longer. As Cards can be used virtually anywhere you do business, the Corporate Card program helps you manage working capital more effectively by allowing your company to:
Help stay cash flow positive with up to 51 days of interest-free credit period 1
Manage expenses with no pre-set spending limit
1 Manage payments by extending up to 51 days: Depending on when you make a purchase and when your statement is issued.
Control and Track Employee Expenditure
Easily consolidate Cardmember spend into a single payment method to streamline your expense management process and save your company both time and money. Plus enjoy real-time visibility and control over employee expenditure.
Stay in control of employee spending by setting customised spend limits for each individual Cardmember.
Manage and mitigate your company’s risk exposure with the choice of either combined or full corporate liability.
Have confidence in company spending with advanced security systems that utilise robust fraud detection and protection.
Account Management on-the-go
With the American Express ® Mobile App, Cardmembers can enjoy support & service Chat feature to resolve your queries on-the-go. Alternatively, Cardmembers can anytime securely view their spends and statements on the Online Account website.
Exemplary Service and Support
Express Cash Facility
Use the Corporate Card to access cash from ATMs globally, subject to written authorisation by your Company.
Emergency Card Replacement
If your Card is lost, stolen or damaged, simply report to us and we’ll replace it within 48 hours at no extra cost. Your liability will be ‘nil’ if you report within 3 working days. In case you are unable to register a report within 3 working days, your liability will be limited to a maximum of ₹1,000.
End-to-End Program Manager Servicing
Personalized service through Dedicated Relationship Managers & Program Administrator Helpline service.

Green Benefits
American Express ® Green Corporate Card equips your employees with a flexible payment solution for their occasional travel expenses and day-to-day business spends.
Featured Benefits
Membership Rewards ® Program
Green Corporate Card is a great way to incentivize your employees. Every time they use it for business expenses such as air travel, hotel stays, dining, office supplies, online & offline purchases and more, they can earn points and then redeem them for valuable rewards. To know more, click here
Benefits:
No Enrollment Fee | No points expiry | No redemption charges
Redemption Options:
350+ e-vouchers across 175 brands
Points transfer to leading airline and hotel loyalty program
Pay with points directly at checkout, online or in-store
Cover eligible Card charges with points
A simple way to manage business expenses
Green Corporate Card is an easier and more efficient way to manage expenses for forward-thinking businesses. It helps you consolidate multiple expenses into one account, improves control over employee spending, offers greater visibility of spends, and drives savings with various offers across spend categories such as travel, dining, car rental, fuel, office supplies, online and offline purchases and more.
Earn rewards for everyday business expenses
Membership Rewards ® Program
Enroll
Enroll your Green Corporate Card into the individual Membership Rewards ® program, subject to your Company’s participation in the program. To enroll, you can simply call up the number on the back of the Card.
Earn
Earn 1 Membership Rewards Point for every Rs.100 spent on purchases of telecommunications, insurance, Wholesale Spends, and other utility services (capped to a maximum of 1000 points per month) and no Membership Rewards Point on spends at Fuel. Also, earn 1 Membership Rewards Point for every Rs. 50 on all other spending. To know more visit here
Redeem
Points can be redeemed for a huge range of rewards – from gift cards, points transfer to Air/Hotel loyalty programs, booking travel with points to statement credit, and more.
Assistance While You Travel
Global Emergency Care Helpline
Sometimes the unexpected happens when you travel. A passport is lost, you come down with a sudden illness, a lawyer is needed. Being a Cardmember can make things easier. Global Assist ® Hotline can help you prepare for your trip with customs information and more.
While you're traveling miles away from home, co-ordination and assistance services such as lost passport replacement assistance, translation services, missing luggage assistance, and emergency legal and medical referrals are just a phone call away. Cardmembers are responsible for the costs charged by third-party service providers.
Award-winning 24-Hour Customer Service
Professional and dedicated customer support is always just a phone call away to assist you with billing enquires, replacement Card requests, or access to a Card benefit or service.
Complimentary Business Travel Insurance
Keep your employees protected when they travel both domestically and internationally with complimentary Personal Accident Cover and Licensed Transport Accident Cover for return trips paid with your Corporate Card. Your Card’s complimentary insurance includes cover up to ₹30,00,000 as well as 24x7 access to the American Express Global Assist ® Hotline for emergencies.
Insurance is provided and underwritten by ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Limited, and is subject to the Terms and Conditions of cover. Exclusions and limitations apply.
Boost Efficiency and Productivity for Business
Online Program Management through @Work
Keep an eye on who’s spending what and get greater visibility of your payables. American Express @Work is a business-to-business online tool, that gives you a clear picture of all your business expenses charged to the Corporate Card. It enables you to deliver more effective supplier strategies, monitor compliance and streamline processes. With @Work you can:
Get reports at your fingertips: The sophisticated reporting capabilities allow you to review and analyse data and spending patterns.
Maximise control: With @Work you enjoy hands-on control over expenses by viewing your Company’s expense trends and setting Cardmember spending limits.
Improve compliance: Since you get a detailed view of business expenses incurred, you can easily spot out-of-policy spending. You can set clear spending mandates for your employees and also monitor compliance with suppliers.
Manage the Corporate Card program with ease: From submitting new Card applications to Card replacement requests and managing Cardmember information, @Work makes your day-to-day activities easier.
Control your Working Capital more effectively
Each Corporate Card provides instant access to unsecured funds that can help your company keep cash on hand for longer. As Cards can be used virtually anywhere you do business, the Corporate Card program helps you manage working capital more effectively by allowing your company to:
Help manage payments with up to 51 days 1 of interest-free credit period
Manage expenses with no pre-set spending limit
1 Manage payments by extending up to 51 days: Depending on when you make a purchase, and when your statement is issued.
Control and Track Employee Expenditure
Easily consolidate Cardmember spend into a single payment method to streamline your expense management process and save your company both time and money.
Stay in control of employee spending by setting customised spend limits for each individual Cardmember.
Manage and mitigate your company’s risk exposure with the choice of either combined or full corporate liability.
Have confidence in company spending with advanced security systems that utilise robust fraud detection and protection .
Account Management on-the-go
With the American Express ® Mobile App, Cardmembers can enjoy support & service Chat feature to resolve your queries on-the-go. Alternatively, Cardmembers can anytime securely view their spends and statements on the Online Account website.
Exemplary service and support to back you at every step
Express Cash Facility
Use the Corporate Card to access cash from ATMs globally, subject to written authorisation by your Company.
Emergency Card Replacement
If your Card is lost, stolen or damaged, simply report to us and we’ll replace it within 48 hours at no extra cost. Your liability will be ‘nil’ if you report within 3 working days. In case you are unable to register a report within 3 working days, your liability will be limited to a maximum of ₹1,000.
End-to-End Program Manager Servicing
Personalised service through dedicated Relationship Managers and Program Administrator Helpline service.
